body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55745", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "Cotonti 1.0.0 (master branch, commit f43f1fc3) is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in the Personal File Storage (PFS) module. In modules/pfs/inc/pfs.editfolder.php, the folder update action ('a=update') updates folder metadata (title, description, public/gallery flags) without calling cot_check_xg() to validate the anti-CSRF token. A remote attacker who lures an authenticated user into visiting a malicious page can force the browser to submit a forged request that modifies the victim's folder metadata, including making a private folder public.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00116, "percentile": 0.01877}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hp3v-wp32-953h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T14:51:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hp3v-wp32-953h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hp3v-wp32-953h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55745"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T08:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-06-18T12:40:26Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-55745", "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti", "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti/blob/f43f1fc38ba4e02027786dad9dac1435c7c52b30/modules/pfs/inc/pfs.editfolder.php#L90", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hp3v-wp32-953h"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Cotonti/Cotonti", "summary": "Cotonti:  Cross-Site Request Forgery in the Personal File Storage (PFS) module", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T14:51:19Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hp3v-wp32-953h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "cotonti/cotonti"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
